title: Presentation dates
content:
Hi all,


Hope you all enjoyed the teamwork session yesterday! I know Monet had a terrific time hanging out with each of you. Here are the randomly assigned dates for your presentations:

Nov 20th: Group 10, Group 1, Group 6

Dec 2nd: Group 2, Group 7, Group 9

Dec 4th: Group 4, Group 11

Cheers,
Sina
